description: Using the Splunk Enterprise web interface (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin/SplunkAdmin1!), analyze the real SSH authentication events in the 'security_logs' index by reconstructing complete attack sessions grouped by source IP address. Create a report named 'SSH_Brute_Force_Sessions' and a dashboard named 'SSH_Session_Analysis' containing at least two panels visualizing this session data, such as a table of the longest sessions and a chart of events per session.
